justification: All six pass criteria met: (1) Chain timeout violation identified — OrderService can take 6s via 3s+retry but CartService timeout is 5s, explicitly called out. (2) Missing circuit breaker on CartService→OrderService identified and flagged as blocking. (3) PaymentService 8s gateway timeout > CartService 5s timeout identified as orphaned call/payment risk. (4) Dual-write/partial completion risk thoroughly covered — order created but payment not captured, and the reverse (payment captured but CartService timed out). (5) Saga/compensation pattern recommended, escalated to MJ for architecture decision. (6) Verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough chain timeout analysis with concrete math showing why the hierarchy is inverted
Correctly identified the orphaned payment scenario as a money-losing bug, not just a technical issue
Identified the dual-write risk in both directions: order without payment AND payment without order
Circuit breaker gaps identified comprehensively — both CartService→OrderService and PaymentService→Gateway
Went beyond rubric requirements: identified missing idempotency keys, missing distributed tracing, missing correlation IDs, and thread pool exhaustion risks
Prioritized recommendations clearly into must-fix blocking, should-have, and nice-to-have tiers
Escalation routing to Coach K and MJ for architectural decisions demonstrates good team awareness
Operational readiness section covers on-call gaps and reconciliation needs — exactly what a stability reviewer should flag
